description_long: This bird features an impressive display of elongated, grass-like feathers radiating from its wings and tail, giving it a dynamic and almost mythical appearance. The body is covered in a dense, textured plumage of earthy yellow and brown tones, while the wings and tail are accentuated with streaks of green and hints of orange. The underbelly and lower body transition into a cluster of dark, leaf-like shapes, interspersed with blue and black elements that add visual contrast. The head is small and rounded, with a short, conical beak and a subtle crest. The legs are mostly obscured by the dense feathering, but appear to be dark in color. The overall form is highly stylized, with exaggerated feather shapes and a dramatic, upward-reaching posture.
description: A stylized bird with long, grass-like feathers in earthy yellows, greens, and browns, accented by blue and black leaf-like shapes on its lower body.
description_view_0: The bird is seen with both wings fully outstretched, showing the dramatic sweep of its feather tips and the dense, blue-black cluster beneath its body.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the curvature of the right wing and the layered, grass-like feathers, with the head and beak more visible.
description_view_2: The bird's back and both wings are visible, emphasizing the symmetry of the feather arrangement and the dark, leafy tail cluster.
description_view_3: The left wing is most prominent, with the feather tips splaying outward and the blue-black lower body cluster partially obscured.
attribute_plumage_pattern: elongated, grass-like feathers with mottled and streaked patterns; solid earthy tones with blue-black lower body cluster
